info.title: Basware OAUTH2 authentication APIs
info.description:
**Using OAUTH2.0 authentication:**

Get API access token from api.basware.com/tokens
1. Using client id and client secret, which you can obtain from Basware. 
2. Specify which APIs can be accessed by using the token e.g. Read only access to vendors API only (these are called scopes). Available scopes are listed at <https://developer.basware.com/api/p2p/manual#AccessRights>. 
3. Each token has an expiration time, until which it can be used to call APIs.

When using OAUTH2 authentication, you need to pass the OAUTH2 authentication token when calling Basware API endpoints. Available Basware API operations are documented at <https://api.basware.com/swagger>. 

See the Basware API developer site at <https://developer.basware.com/api/p2p/manual#Authentication> for more details on API authentication.

post.description:
Tokens returned by this API are used to provide access to Basware API operations when OAUTH2 authorization is used for the API requests. The available operations are defined at <https://api.basware.com/swagger>.
             
Note: the request body parameters are sent as HTTP form parameters ('application/x-www-form-urlencoded') for this authentication API, while they are sent as raw application/json in the API operations defined at https://api.basware.com/swagger.

parameters.name: authorization

schema.description: To authorize your access token request, please pass the client id and client secret of your oAUTH2 client as username and password. These are sent by using Basic HTTP authorization, in the 'authorization' header. Passed as HTTP form parameter.
schema.title: Authorization

parameters.description: To authorize your access token request, please pass the client id and client secret of your oAUTH2 client as username and password. These are sent by using Basic HTTP authorization, in the 'authorization' header. Passed as HTTP form parameter.

get.summary: Provides jwks.json containing metadata to validate token signature.
get.description: Returns signature keys for verifying authenticity of OAUTH2 tokens issued by Basware API. This endpoint is used by Basware to validate tokens passed by API clients in API operation requests using OAUTH2 authentication. It is good practice for the oauth2 tokens (from 'tokens' API) to be validated also by the API client.

get.summary: Provides configuration information about the Basware API Authentication Service (IDP).
get.description: This is a discovery endpoint to locate public keys used to validate Basware API access tokens.

grant_type.title: Grant Type
grant_type.description: Oauth2 grant type. Supported value(s): 'client_credentials' = Client credential authentication flow.

scope.title: Scope
scope.description: Scopes define the operations (e.g. vendors.write) allowed using the returned access token. See <https://developer.basware.com/api/p2p/manual#AccessRights> for list of available operations. Passed as HTTP form parameter.

kid.title: Kid
kid.description: Defines the unique identifier for the key

use.title: Use
use.description: Defines how the key was meant to be used

alg.title: Alg
alg.description: Defines the algorithm for the key

keys.title: Keys
keys.description: List of public keys available to validate access tokens.
